response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior Java role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates high attrition risk and salary expectation gaps. Java appears only as a minor skill (robotic arms work years ago); primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. German is only Basic, but the role requires strong German for insurance-sector client work in Germany. The candidate is also based in Bucharest, not Germany, complicating the travel-within-Germany requirement.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, agile)
Broad polyglot experience including some Java exposure
Computer Science degree and proven delivery track record
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior position
German language only Basic — role requires strong German
Java is not a core skill; primary expertise is TS/Node/DLang
